title: Amor am Steuer
writer: Erich Friesen, Erich Schönfelder, Ludwig Tell
actors: Ossi Oswalda, Victor Janson, Rudolf Forster
plot: "Cupid at the Wheel" - A millionaire daughter is to be married to a man unknown to her. To get to know him, she slips into men's clothes, sticks on a mustache and becomes hired as a chauffeur.
